title: Advertising and Persuasion Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A natural ability to do something well.
choices: aptitude
cunning
concession
rounds.answer: aptitude
rounds.explanation: aptitude: A natural ability to do something well.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Small and delicate in a way that is attractive.
choices: aptitude
cunning
dainty
rounds.answer: dainty
rounds.explanation: dainty: Small and delicate in a way that is attractive.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To rise and move in large waves or clouds.
choices: cunning
billow
aptitude
rounds.answer: billow
rounds.explanation: billow: To rise and move in large waves or clouds.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A person or group that opposes or fights against another.
rounds.answer: adversary

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Angry and ready to fight or argue.
rounds.answer: belligerent

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Something that makes a lot of money or profit.
rounds.answer: lucrative

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: She has a great aptitude for learning new languages quickly.
The insolent student talked back to the teacher in class.
The belligerent dog barked loudly at anyone who came near.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: She has a great aptitude for learning new languages quickly.
The insolent student talked back to the teacher in class.
Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: She started a lucrative business selling handmade jewellery online.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The garden was bountiful, filled with many fruits and vegetables.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Many people think that printed newspapers are becoming obsolete.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'intricate' mean in this unit?
choices: Very detailed and complicated, with many small parts or patterns.
A natural ability to do something well.
Having the ability to achieve things in a clever and often deceptive way.
rounds.answer: Very detailed and complicated, with many small parts or patterns.
rounds.explanation: intricate: Very detailed and complicated, with many small parts or patterns.

rounds.prompt: What does 'bleak' mean in this unit?
choices: A natural ability to do something well.

rounds.answer: Something that is cold, empty, and without hope or happiness.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.
